items.title: ACH form submitted for Emface equipment
items.summary: Olivia provided the ACH authorization form for the Emface Workstation w. TMJ Applicator to MMP Capital. The issue is now resolved.
items.actionNeeded: No action needed; resolved by Olivia.

items.title: neuroPULSE HRV equipment still under review
items.summary: INSiGHT CLA is following up on the neuroPULSE (HRV) equipment proposal. Yanina indicated the team is still reviewing the sample report and aligning on next steps.
items.actionNeeded: Decide on timeline for neuroPULSE equipment decision and communicate to vendor.

items.title: Copy call rescheduled for Infusive platform page
items.summary: Influex is coordinating a call for Wednesday, June 3 at 4pm Eastern to discuss the new direction for Infusive's Platform page and to scope and quote the work.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm attendance for June 3 call at 4pm ET.

items.title: Aging Well Podcast materials ready for media page
items.summary: UPQODE received materials from The Aging Well Podcast featuring Dr. Will Haas and is awaiting approval to add them to the Media Page.
items.actionNeeded: Review podcast materials and approve what should be added to the Media Page.
